name: Copilot
author: Exorcist Team
description: GitHub Copilot AI provider — code completions and chat powered by OpenAI Codex.

name: Claude
author: Exorcist Team
description: Anthropic Claude AI provider — chat and agentic coding powered by Claude models.

name: Codex
author: Exorcist Team
description: OpenAI Codex/GPT provider — chat and code generation via OpenAI API.

name: Ollama
author: Exorcist Team
description: Ollama local AI provider — run LLMs locally for chat and completions.

name: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)
author: Exorcist Team
description: Bring Your Own Key provider — use any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint with your own API key.

name: Hello World (Lua)
author: Exorcist Team
description: Sample Lua plugin — registers a greeting command and listens for editor events.

name: Git Reminder (Lua)
author: Exorcist Team
description: Reminds you to commit after accumulating unsaved work.

name: Word Count (Lua)
author: Exorcist Team
description: Displays word and character count for the current document in the status bar.

name: File Stats (Lua)
author: Exorcist Team
description: Shows file statistics — line count, size, encoding — in a notification.

name: Save Guard (Lua)
author: Exorcist Team
description: Warns before saving files with potential issues (TODO markers, debug prints).

name: Quick Insert (Lua)
author: Exorcist Team
description: Insert common code snippets (timestamps, UUIDs, Lorem Ipsum) via commands.
